PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-06-2007 Continued To Mar-07-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Seth Skootsky appearing for Larry Goppert. Naznin Challa appearing for Sondra Kohn. Issues addressed. The trustee of the Laser Trust did not get notice. Mr. Skootsky argued that he did not get the trust instrument and he was informed that the trustee is a company in the Cook Islands. Ms. Challa argued that Mr. Skootsky's client is not named in the trust and her client wants to keep the trust terms confidential. Court wants to see a copy of the trust. Ms. Challa will submit a copy of the trust to the Court for in camera review. Both counsel will meet and confer on the issues. Court wants a status report on the sale of the real property. Matter is continued to 3/7. Special Letters is extended to 3/7. Order signed.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: J. Peralta.
